digest.component_or_area: MCP tool reference generator + CI drift gate
propositions: Generate docs/mcp-reference.md from the MCP server's own registrars, listing all 47 tools (23 read, 6 llm, 18 write), mirroring the gen_env_registry.py generator + drift-gate pattern.

The generator must enumerate each registrar with REBAR_MCP_READONLY=0 so write tools register, since only REBAR_MCP_READONLY changes list membership and a naive ambient list_tools() produces a partial reference.

Classify tools by their registering registrar and apply a closed four-entry special-case override table (reconcile, fsck, sign_review, run_workflow), with a drift check asserting these names remain in their expected registrars.
The doc emits three gate-tier sections (Read-only, LLM-gated, Write-gated) with the four hybrids as inline annotations; sign_review belongs under Write-gated not LLM-gated.
A --check drift mode fails when the committed doc is stale, and the gate must be wired into both test.yml and gerrit-verify.yaml enforced by test_ci_workflow_parity.py.
